title: Senior Doctor - Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises!
